hard_violations.message: Need exactly 1 kitchen(s); layout has 0. Program: 1 living + 1 kitchen + 3 bedrooms + 2 bathrooms (+ halls).
Need at least one corridor / hall for circulation.
Need exactly 2 bedroom(s); layout has 1. Program: 1 living + 1 kitchen + 3 bedrooms + 2 bathrooms (+ halls).
Need exactly 2 bathroom(s); layout has 1. Program: 1 living + 1 kitchen + 3 bedrooms + 2 bathrooms (+ halls).
bathroom longest side is 20.0 ft; a bathroom is capped at ≤ 15 ft/side (no slab-shaped rooms).
Front door (20.0,0.0) must open into living_room on the south wall (spans x∈[0.0,20.0]), inset ≥ 2 ft from its side walls.
